summary: Project involves a private events booking site with pricing ($650/2hr, $800/3hr). No dedicated staff mentioned — guests manage their own party. $100 weekday discount (Mon–Thu) for private bookings.
architectural_notes: Private event pricing: $650 for 2 hours, $800 for 3 hours
Weekday discount: $100 off private bookings on Monday–Thursday
No dedicated staff — guests self-manage their party

existing_features.title: Remove all mentions of 'dedicated staff', 'staff assistance', or any similar language implying that staff will be assigned to or help manage a private party, from the PrivateEvents component and any other frontend components that reference it. The copy should reflect that guests manage their own party.

Add a $100 weekday discount to the Private Events section. Display a discounted price for bookings made on Monday through Thursday. For example, if the standard price is $650 for 2 hours, show $550 for weekday bookings; if $800 for 3 hours, show $700 for weekday bookings. Clearly label the discount (e.g., 'Weekday discount: Save $100 when you book Monday–Thursday').

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove all mentions of dedicated staff from the site
Add $100 discount for private parties booked on weekdays (Monday–Thursday)
